title: I Could Never Replace My Sister
overview: Marie is always dressed in tatters and is treated like a servant in her own home. Then she meets Count Kyros.

title: Marie, I Want to Marry You
overview: Kyros hates aristocratic society and its ties of obligation. But why? And what changed when he met Marie?

title: A Life I Saw in a Dream, and a Dream-like Life
overview: Marie begins her new life as Kyros' fiancée and finds herself bewildered by the differences from her old life.

title: I've Found the Things I Like
overview: Kyros wants to provide Marie with every comfort, but Mio cautions him. Then a package from the baron arrives.

title: The Prince and the Pitch-Black Warrior
overview: Luiphon takes Marie to a sword fighting contest. The ferocity of it scares her. Then the dark warrior fights.

title: Am I Enough As I Am?
overview: Liu Liu, Kyros' mother, discovers surprising things about Marie. Mio investigates the baron on Kyros' orders.

title: You're So Close, I Think You May Make Me Dizzy
overview: Mio investigates a comment in a letter from Marie's brother. Marie and Kyros go to the capital for a date.

title: A Gift More Lovely Than Jewels
overview: Kyros and Marie meet Luiphon at a jeweler's at his request. Thoughts of Anastasia haunt Marie's happiness.

title: In Pursuit of Anastasia's Spirit
overview: Kyros demands the truth of Anastasia's accident, but he and Marie are not prepared for the answers they find.

title: Please Call Off the Betrothal
overview: Worried, Kyros arranges to meet with Norman. But as Marie hears him describe his apprentice, her fears grow.

title: The Empty Princess Lives
overview: Marie's attacker talks about the past. Why did little Marie's life change so much? Why was she left in rags?

title: It's Time to Settle This
overview: Marie is determined to settle things. But even with everyone's help, how will she confront her parents?
